title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Texas Instruments India International Enterprises - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Texas Instruments India International Enterprises - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Backend Developer looking for your next big career move? Texas Instruments India International Enterprises in Mysuru offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Texas Instruments India International Enterprises:
Texas Instruments India International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Integrate third-party APIs and services

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in MongoDB

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Life and accident insurance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Texas Instruments India International Enterprises!
